hard: Creates draft.md in the first turn.
Creates report.md in the second turn.
Uses the existing draft.md rather than treating the second turn as unrelated.
soft: Final response briefly confirms report.md creation.

criteria.name: Cross-turn continuity
criteria.what_bad_looks_like: The second turn ignores the first turn or starts from scratch.
criteria.what_good_looks_like: The second turn reads or uses draft.md before creating report.md.

criteria.name: Required artifact content
criteria.what_bad_looks_like: report.md missing or missing required lines.
criteria.what_good_looks_like: report.md contains the title, second-turn marker, and a sentence based on draft.md.

anchors.10: draft.md and report.md exist; report.md contains the required marker and references draft.md; final response is concise.
anchors.4: Missing one artifact or weak evidence of cross-turn continuity.
anchors.7: Mostly complete; minor wording or confirmation issues.

task_messages.content: This is a benchmark example. Keep context and workspace state across user turns.

artifacts.excerpt:
# Report
second-turn-marker
This report was based on draft.md.

final_output.text: Done! I read `draft.md` and created `report.md` containing a title `# Report`, the literal line `second-turn-marker`, and a sentence noting that it was based on `draft.md`.
